title: GrassCraft
description: This is a mod that makes grass more useful!
body:
# GrassCraft
## Introduction
Worried that the vanilla grass is too useless? This is a Minecraft mod that makes grass more useful!
## How to use
This mod currently only supports Neoforge.

After downloading the mod, try to get a grass. And you just have to follow the recipe book and make something strange, like grass ball, staff of grass, and so on.
## Screenshots
![Breed two grass blocks.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64bdcb33a1d4111055919e7c90fd719e35a25dff.png)
You can even breed two grass blocks (of course, they're mob in this mod).

Have fun :-)
